events.summary: Tasks phase opened (retroactive — feature created after T1-T7 already shipped via PR #59 + #61). 23 tasks drafted from the 2026-05-08 audit synthesis.
events.retroactive_reason: Feature created post-hoc to capture the audit-driven enhancement rollup; the audit + 7 sub-tasks landed before the feature folder existed.

events.summary: Tasks approved with 23 entries (7 done + 16 pending). 17 audit findings already closed via T1-T7.

Implementation phase opened. T1-T7 already shipped via fitme-story PR #59 (95cb4d1, 13 files +319/-40, prod 05:11:20Z) and PR #61 (a548e5f, 3 files +130/-8, prod 05:31:23Z). FT2 audit docs shipped via PR #254 (f252ded, 6 files +1105). 16 tasks remain.

T16 (P-MOBNAV) MobileNav drawer implemented. PR #62 opened in fitme-story repo (branch feat/fitme-story-mobile-nav, commit e6c99e1). 3 files +187/-29: src/lib/nav.ts (new, shared NAV), src/components/MobileNav.tsx (new, native dialog), src/components/SiteHeader.tsx (refactored to use shared nav + render MobileNav). Closes V-004 P0 + partial V-005/V-009/A-001. tsc clean, next build passes 46 case-study pages.

T22+T23 (F7+F8 cross-repo gate parity) — 'document the asymmetry' disposition. Hook fix in .claude/settings.json (cwd-guard for observe-cache-hit.py) + new spec doc docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-08-cross-repo-gate-asymmetry.md. Closes recurring 30+ blocking-error notifications observed all session.

T8 (G3 dual-outlet pattern doc) shipped via FT2 chore PR. New doc at docs/case-studies/dual-outlet-pattern.md (~9 sections, 11KB). Establishes the contract between FT2 source case study and fitme-story slot MDX. Unblocks T9 (G5 timeline frontmatter audit) by giving G5 a concrete checklist (§7) to walk against.

T17 (P-MDX-CODE) rehype-pretty-code + CopyButton shipped via fitme-story PR #65 (commit d8893fe). 7 files +482/-5. Closes A-024 + R-008 + CS-004. Bonus: dev-guide page now also has heading anchors (CS-007 bonus). New deps rehype-pretty-code + shiki. Dual-theme github-light/dark.

T21 (FIG-W6) fitme-story design architecture doc. New doc at docs/design-system/fitme-story-design-architecture.md (~9 sections, ~16KB). Documents Tailwind v4 @theme tokens (brand + skill palette + neutrals + measures + type scale), dark mode WCAG contract (4 overrides), component architecture (4 layers), /design build contract (forward-looking for T18+), maintenance protocol.
